instructions.instruction: **Always run `mix credo gen.config` first** — never hand-craft .credo.exs from scratch
instructions.original_snippets: **Always run `mix credo gen.config` first** — never hand-craft .credo.exs from scratch
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger credo-config.

instructions.instruction: **Use `--strict` in CI** — enables additional checks that are disabled by default
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `--strict` in CI** — enables additional checks that are disabled by default
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger credo-config.

instructions.instruction: Strict mode enables additional checks disabled by default (mostly design-related). CI must use `--strict`.
instructions.original_snippets: Strict mode enables additional checks disabled by default (mostly design-related). CI must use `--strict`.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger credo-config.
